28 March 2026 Military News

Operations
Defense Policy / Programs

Other Conflicts
News Reports

Current Operations

    Other Operations

  • Iraqi resistance conducts drone strike on US-run base in Syria Press TV 28 Mar 2026 -- Fighters from the anti-terror group Islamic Resistance in Iraq have conducted a drone strike against an installation operated by US occupation forces in Syria's southwestern al-Tanf region, close to the borders with Iraq and Jordan.

    • Operation Epic Fury / Operation Roaring Lion | Operation True Promise 4

  • US Deploys Another Aircraft Carrier to Middle East Sputnik 28 Mar 2026 -- The USS George H.W. Bush aircraft carrier, accompanied with several guided missile destroyers, will deploy to US Central Command's area of responsibility - the same command overseeing the ongoing military operation against Iran, CBS News reports.

  • Iran Reports Bushehr Nuclear Plant Hit For Third Time In 10 Days RFE/RL 28 Mar 2026 -- An Israeli air strike hit near Iran's Bushehr nuclear power plant late on March 27 but caused no radiation leak or damage to the reactor, Iranian authorities said, the third such incident in 10 days.
  • Israeli Military Says It Will Have Mostly Destroyed Iran's Arms Production Ability 'Within A Few Days' RFE/RL 28 Mar 2026 -- The Israeli military said Iran's weapons production capabilities will be largely destroyed "within a few days" and that it will take Tehran a "long time" to reconstitute them.
  • In Numbers: The civilian toll of US-Israeli aggression against Iran after 29 days Press TV 28 Mar 2026 -- As the US-Israeli military aggression against Iran entered its 29th day, Iranian officials released updated casualty figures and detailed the extensive damage inflicted on civilian infrastructure across the country.
  • Over 230 children killed in US-Israeli attacks on Iran: Health Ministry Press TV 28 Mar 2026 -- Iran's Health Ministry has said that more than 230 children have been killed and approximately 1,800 others have been injured in ongoing US-Israeli aggression on Iran.

  • Iranian Strike Wounds US Troops In Saudi Arabia As Houthis Enter War RFE/RL 28 Mar 2026 -- At least 12 US troops were wounded, two of them seriously, according to media reports, when Iran struck Prince Sultan Air Base in Saudi Arabia with at least one missile and several drones, as Yemen's Houthi rebels launched their first missiles at Israel since the war began, threatening to broaden a conflict now in its fifth week.
  • US-Israeli aggression on Iran: What happened on 29th day of the imposed war Press TV 28 Mar 2026 -- Twenty-nine days into the US-Israeli war on Iran, launched on February 28 with the assassination of the Leader of the Islamic Revolution, Ayatollah Seyyed Ali Khamenei, US-Israeli aggression continued to target Iran's civilian infrastructure.
  • IRGC: Israeli, US universities in region legitimate targets after strikes on Iranian university Press TV 28 Mar 2026 -- The Islamic Revolution Guards Corps (IRGC) has declared that Israeli and American universities in West Asia have become targets of Iran's retaliatory strikes following attacks on a major Iranian university.
  • True Promise 4: Iran and resistance axis ops. against US-Israeli assets on Mar. 28 Press TV 28 Mar 2026 -- On Saturday, March 28, 2027, the Islamic Revolution Guards Corps (IRGC) and the Iranian Army conducted multiple operations as part of Operation True Promise 4, which was launched immediately after the US-Israeli coalition carried out an unprovoked act of aggression against the Islamic Republic of Iran on February 28.
  • UAE's biggest aluminum facility suffers heavy damage in Iranian strikes Press TV 28 Mar 2026 -- Emirates Global Aluminum (EGA) says its key production site in Abu Dhabi suffered significant damage following Iranian missile and drone strikes, with several employees injured.
  • IRGC strikes US-Israeli industrial sites in retaliation for infrastructure attacks Press TV 28 Mar 2026 -- The IRGC announces a large-scale missile and drone operation targeting heavy industries belonging to the American-Israeli enemy in occupied territories and other locations in the region.
  • Iranian Army drones hit Israeli electronic warfare, radar systems in Haifa Press TV 28 Mar 2026 -- Iran's Army says it has targeted strategic centers in Israel's Haifa port and Ben Gurion Air Base with drones, as an unprovoked war of aggression by the United States and Israeli regime against the Islamic Republic enters its fifth week.
  • Iran strikes depot of Ukrainian anti-drone systems in Dubai: Military official Press TV 28 Mar 2026 -- An Iranian military official says the country has carried out coordinated attacks in Dubai targeting a Ukrainian air defense equipment depot supporting US forces.
  • Over 500 US troops targeted in Dubai strikes; heavy casualties expected: Iran military Press TV 28 Mar 2026 -- The Khatam al-Anbiya Central Headquarters says over 500 US troops were targeted in the Iranian Armed Forces' latest operations, which inflicted "very heavy losses" among them.
  • Iran agrees to safe passage of aid vessels through Strait of Hormuz Press TV 28 Mar 2026 -- Iran's ambassador and permanent representative to the UN office in Geneva says the Islamic Republic has agreed to the safe passage of aid ships through the Strait of Hormuz.
  • US-Israeli aggression on Iran: What happened on 28th day of the imposed war Press TV 28 Mar 2026 -- Twenty-eight days into the US-Israeli war on Iran, launched on February 28 with the assassination of the Leader of the Islamic Revolution, Ayatollah Seyyed Ali Khamenei, US-Israeli aggression continued to target Iran's civilian infrastructure.
  • IRGC: Scores of US soldiers slain as tactical vessels targeted in Persian Gulf Press TV 28 Mar 2026 -- The Islamic Revolution Guards Corps (IRGC) has announced the targeting of six tactical vessels operated by the terrorist US military in the Persian Gulf waters, leaving a large number of American forces killed in the process.
  • Iran Attacks US Navy Support Ship in Port of Salalah in Oman - Military Command Sputnik 28 Mar 2026 -- The Iranian armed forces attacked a US Navy support ship in the port of Salalah in Oman at a distance of more than 1,000 kilometers (620 miles) from the coast of the Islamic Republic, Ebrahim Zolfaghari, spokesman for the Khatam Al-Anbiya central headquarters of the Iranian military command, said on Saturday.
  • Iranian Strike Hits US Air Base in Saudi Arabia, at Least 10 Troops Injured — Reports Sputnik 28 Mar 2026 -- An Iranian missile struck the Prince Sultan Air Base in Saudi Arabia, injuring at least 10 US troops, two seriously, and damaging several US refueling aircraft, The Wall Street Journal reported.

  • Yemen launches 2nd major strike on Israeli targets in solidarity with Iran, Resistance Axis Press TV 28 Mar 2026 -- Yemen's Armed Forces subject the Israeli regime to their second major solidarity strike in support of Iran and the Axis of Resistance amid ongoing unprovoked American-Israeli aggression targeting the Islamic Republic and regional resistance movements.
  • Houthi Entry Into Iran War Raises Specter Of Twin Chokepoint Crisis RFE/RL 28 Mar 2026 -- Yemen's Houthi rebels on March 28 fired their first missiles at Israel since the Iran war began, but analysts warn the more consequential threat is not the projectiles aimed at Israeli territory - it is what the group could do to global energy markets.
  • Yemen officially joins fight against US, Israel by firing missiles at occupied territories Press TV 28 Mar 2026 -- The Yemeni Armed Forces says it has officially joined the war against the US-Israeli front in support of the Islamic Republic of Iran and the Resistance Front in Lebanon, Iraq, and Palestine.
  • Yemen's Houthis Launch Missile Attack on Targets in Israel - Statement Sputnik 28 Mar 2026 -- Yemen's Ansar Allah movement, also known as the Houthis, said on Saturday that it had launched a missile attack on targets in Israel in support of Iran, which is being attacked by the United States and Israel.

  • Israel rations advanced interceptors amid relentless Iranian missile barrages: Report Press TV 28 Mar 2026 -- Israel has been forced to ration its most advanced interceptors to prevent a total collapse of its defense stockpiles as Iran's relentless missile barrages continue as the war enters its fifth week, says a report.

  • Trump Suggests US May Not Support NATO Amid Anger Over Refusal To Join Iran War RFE/RL 28 Mar 2026 -- US President Donald Trump again expressed his disdain for NATO, saying that "I guess we don't have to be there" for the alliance if needed following his complaints that it didn't support the US war with Iran, comments likely to send shockwaves through member nations.
  • 'We Have Another 3,554 Targets Left' — Trump on Iran Sputnik 28 Mar 2026 -- US President Donald Trump said more strikes on Iran are planned, even as he claims "talks" are ongoing amid the continuing US-Israeli aggression against Iran.
  • Disaster in the making: US lawmakers, former officials warn against sending troops to Iran Press TV 28 Mar 2026 -- Former military officials and lawmakers in the United States are becoming increasingly worried about a potential deployment of American ground forces to Iranian territory, including a possible offensive to seize a strategic oil hub, according to a report by the MSNBC.
  • Trump Blasts NATO For Failing To Help In Iran War, While US Casualties Grow RFE/RL 28 Mar 2026 -- US President Donald Trump again cast doubt on American support for NATO for its lack of help in the Iran war, suggesting Washington might not aid member nations in need, while he also said talks to end the war were progressing, even as US casualties mounted.

  • Iran warns of US, Israeli plots to expand aggression by involving other states, staging 'false-flag ops.' Press TV 28 Mar 2026 -- Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi has warned that the United States and the Israeli regime might seek to expand their ongoing unprovoked aggression targeting Iran.
  • Iran weighing withdrawal from NPT after US-Israel attacks on nuclear sites Press TV 28 Mar 2026 -- Iran is reportedly considering its withdrawal from the Treaty on the Non-Proliferation of Nuclear Weapons (NPT) after the United States and Israeli regime carried out attacks on the country's nuclear sites.
  • Iran's fierce response will accelerate collapse of Israeli army: Speaker Press TV 28 Mar 2026 -- Iranian Parliament Speaker Mohammad Bagher Qalibaf says the country's extensive and devastating response to the Israeli regime's ongoing aggression will accelerate the collapse of the regime's military.
  • Pezeshkian warns of Israel's 'vicious' plan to expand Iran war across region Press TV 28 Mar 2026 -- Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian has warned against the Israeli regime's "vicious" plans to expand the ongoing war with the Islamic Republic to countries across the region.
  • Iran censures US 'deception' as biggest obstacle to ending war Press TV 28 Mar 2026 -- Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi says apart from continued US-Israeli aggression against Iran, the biggest roadblock to ending the war is Washington's contradictory statements and its use of deception, which have only deepened Tehran's distrust and skepticism.
  • Pezeshkian warns aggressors: Iran won't launch preemptive attacks, but will retaliate strongly Press TV 28 Mar 2026 -- Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian has warned that Tehran will respond forcefully to any attacks targeting its infrastructure or economic centers, while reiterating that Iran does not initiate preemptive strikes.
  • Iran complains to UN: US-Israeli attack on fuel tanks blatant violation of international humanitarian law Press TV 28 Mar 2026 -- Iran's Minister of Petroleum has condemned a deliberate US-Israeli attack on fuel storage tanks as a clear violation of international humanitarian law and multilateral environmental commitments.
  • Qalibaf: Energy market 'numb' to US fake news to lower prices Press TV 28 Mar 2026 -- Iran's Parliament Speaker Mohammad Baqer Qalibaf says the global energy market has become "numb" to attempts by US officials at price manipulation through fake news.

  • Middle East war: UN initiatives support mediation, 'lifesaving' fertiliser shipments UN News 28 Mar 2026 -- Just hours after war broke out in the Middle East last month, United Nations Secretary-General António Guterres warned the Security Council that the fighting risked "igniting a chain of events that no one can control in the most volatile region of the world."
  • No radiation risk detected after attacks on Iran's Khondab, Khuzestan plants: IAEA People's Daily 28 Mar 2026 -- No radiation risk has been detected at Iran's facilities in Khondab and Khuzestan following attacks on Friday, the International Atomic Energy Agency (IAEA) said.
  • UN sets up task force regarding Strait of Hormuz amid Mideast hostilities People's Daily 28 Mar 2026 -- UN Secretary-General Antonio Guterres has established a task force to develop and propose technical mechanisms specifically designed to meet humanitarian needs in the Strait of Hormuz, his spokesperson said Friday.

  • Russia Evacuates 163 More Of Its Staff From Bushehr Nuclear Power Plant In Iran RFE/RL 28 Mar 2026 -- Rosatom, the Russian operator of the Bushehr nuclear power plant in western Iran, has evacuated 163 more of its staff, saying the situation at the facility continues to deteriorate.
  • Reports: Russia About To Deliver Drone Shipment To Iran RFE/RL 28 Mar 2026 -- European intelligence agencies have made an assessment that Russia "is in the final stages of preparing to supply drones to Iran for use in its war with the US and Israel," according to a report in The Guardian, citing an unnamed senior European official.
  • Comment by Foreign Ministry Spokeswoman Maria Zakharova on continuous strikes against peaceful nuclear facilities in Iran Russia Ministry of Foreign Affairs 28 Mar 2026
  • Countries Attacking Iran's Nuclear Facilities Undermine Non-Proliferation Treaty — Russian MFA Spox Sputnik 28 Mar 2026 -- Countries attacking peaceful nuclear facilities in Iran are undermining the Treaty on the Non-Proliferation of Nuclear Weapons (NPT) and the International Atomic Energy Agency's (IAEA) verification mechanisms, Russian Foreign Ministry spokeswoman Maria Zakharova said.

  • HRH the Crown Prince Discusses Regional Developments with Indian Prime Minister SPA 28 Mar 2026 -- His Royal Highness Prince Mohammed bin Salman bin Abdulaziz Al Saud, Crown Prince and Prime Minister, received today a phone call from Prime Minister of the Republic of India Narendra Modi, during which the Indian prime minister reiterated his country's condemnation of the repeated Iranian attacks that threaten the Kingdom's security and sovereignty
  • Ministry of Defense Spokesperson: Three Drones Intercepted and Destroyed in the Past Hours SPA 28 Mar 2026

  • Ukraine Denies Iranian Claim It Destroyed Anti-Drone Depot In Dubai RFE/RL 28 Mar 2026 -- Ukraine has flatly denied an Iranian claim that the Islamic Revolutionary Guards Corps (IRGC) destroyed a Ukrainian anti-drone weapons depot in Dubai, calling it disinformation.
  • Phone conversation between the Foreign Ministers of Armenia and Iran Ministry of Foreign Affairs of the Republic of Armenia 28 Mar 2026 -- On March 28, Minister of Foreign Affairs of Armenia Ararat Mirzoyan had a phone conversation with Minister of Foreign Affairs of Iran Seyed Abbas Araghchi.
  • 20 Pakistani-Flagged Ships Allowed To Pass Through Strait Of Hormuz, Pakistani Foreign Minister Says RFE/RL 28 Mar 2026 -- Pakistan's Foreign Minister Ishaq Dar said on March 28 that Iran had agreed to allow an additional 20 Pakistani-flagged ships to pass through the Strait of Hormuz, with two vessels permitted to transit daily.
  • Phone conversation between the Foreign Ministers of Armenia and Qatar Ministry of Foreign Affairs of the Republic of Armenia 28 Mar 2026 -- On March 28, Minister of Foreign Affairs of Armenia Ararat Mirzoyan had a phone conversation with Sheikh Mohammed bin Abdulrahman Al-Thani, Prime Minister and Minister of Foreign Affairs of the State of Qatar.
  • Volodymyr Zelenskyy Received Briefings from Ukrainian Experts Sharing Experience and Expertise in Qatar President of Ukraine 28 Mar 2026
  • The President of Ukraine and the Amir of the State of Qatar Agreed on a 10-Year Defense Partnership President of Ukraine 28 Mar 2026
  • The President Met with Ukrainian Experts Working in the UAE to Provide Assistance in Protecting Lives President of Ukraine 28 Mar 2026
  • Joint Work to Protect Lives and the Situation on the Global Oil Market Were the Key Topics Discussed during a Meeting Between the President of Ukraine and the President of the UAE President of Ukraine 28 Mar 2026
  • RAF personnel become first ever drone 'aces' during operations in the Middle East UK MOD 28 Mar 2026 -- Crack gunners from the RAF Regiment have become 'aces' for the first time, having blasted Iranian drones out of the sky during operations in the Middle East, protecting British interests, partners, and personnel in the region.
  • Raksha Mantri chairs first IGoM meeting to review West Asia situation & its impact on India India PIB 28 Mar 2026 -- Raksha Mantri Shri Rajnath Singh, on March 28, 2026, chaired the first meeting of the Informal Group of Ministers (IGoM) set-up to monitor the evolving situation in West Asia, and recommend proactive measures in response to the developments. Held at Kartavya Bhawan-2, New Delhi, the meeting was attended by Minister of Finance & Corporate Affairs Smt Nirmala Sitharaman; Minister of Parliamentary Affairs Shri Kiren Rijiju; Minister of Petroleum and Natural Gas Shri Hardeep Singh Puri; Minister of Power Shri Manohar Lal; Minister of Chemicals & Fertilizers Shri Jagat Prakash Nadda; Minister of Consumer Affairs, Food and Public Distribution Shri Prahlad Joshi; Minister of Civil Aviation Shri Kinjarapu Rammohan Naidu; and Minister of State (Independent Charge) of the Ministry of Science and Technology Dr Jitendra Singh.

Defense Policy / Programs

  • Australia, India, Japan, New Zealand, U.S. complete exercise Sea Dragon 2026 U.S. 7th Fleet 28 Mar 2026 -- Exercise Sea Dragon 2026 successfully concluded at Andersen Air Force Base, marking the completion of 20 days of intensive multinational anti-submarine warfare (ASW) training, March 28.

  • Trump Eyes Stripping Article 5 Rights From NATO States With Low Defense Spending - Reports Sputnik 28 Mar 2026 -- US President Donald Trump is considering the possibility of depriving NATO member countries that are unable to bring their defense spending up to the required 5% of the right to use the fifth article of the alliance's charter, media reported.

  • Defense AI Center "A1": Ministry of Defence accelerates AI integration into warfare Ukraine MOD 28 Mar 2026 -- The Ministry of Defence of Ukraine is developing the Defense AI Center "A1" to accelerate AI integration in the military domain and shorten the path from battlefield experience to technological solutions.

  • J-10C pilot counters radar provocation, showcasing China's air combat readiness: media Global Times 28 Mar 2026 -- Chinese J-10C fighter pilot swiftly turned on radar to counter a foreign aircraft's provocation after being illuminated by its radar, handling the situation calmly, according to a video program released by China Central Television (CCTV) on Saturday.

  • Cabinet defense budget good for regional security contribution: Greene CNA 28 Mar 2026 -- The United States' representative to Taiwan reiterated his support for the NT$1.25 trillion (US$39 billion) special defense budget proposed by the Cabinet in a recent TV interview, saying it would help Taiwan adapt to modern warfare and contribute to regional security.

  • Vice President of Lockheed Martin visited Estonia to Discuss Future Cooperation Estonia MoD 28 Mar 2026 -- Estonian Minister of Defence Hanno Pevkur and Lockheed Martin Vice President Paula J. Hartley discussed the next steps in establishing a HIMARS sustainment centre in Estonia during a meeting in Tallinn this week.

  • Joint Statement on U.S.-New Zealand Space Dialogue US Dept. of State 27 Mar 2026 -- The text of the following statement was released by the Governments of the United States and New Zealand on the occasion of the second U.S.-New Zealand Space Dialogue.

Defense Industry

Other Conflicts


    Ukraine Conflict News

    Operation Iron Swords / Operation Al-Aqsa Flood | Operation Northern Arrows | Giddeon's Chariots | Roaring Lion (Lebanon)

  • Hezbollah launches fresh strikes against Israeli forces, installations Press TV 28 Mar 2026 -- The Lebanese Hezbollah resistance movement has launched a fresh wave of operations against Israeli military forces, their infrastructure, and vehicles deep inside the occupied territories in defense of Lebanon and its nation.

  • The OIC Condemns the Israeli Occupation Authorities' Decision to Seize 15 Houses and Displace Palestinian Families in Occupied Al-Quds Organization of Islamic Cooperation (OIC) 28 Mar 2026 -- The General Secretariat of the Organization of Islamic Cooperation (OIC) expressed its strong condemnation of the Israeli occupation's illegal decision to seize 15 houses in Silwan town in the occupied city of Al-Quds (Jerusalem) and carry out a forced displacement of Palestinian families from them, in preparation for handing them over to settlement associations
  • Iran reiterates support for Lebanon's sovereignty, says cohesion essential for confronting conspiracies Press TV 28 Mar 2026 -- Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi reiterates Iran's consistent support for Lebanon's sovereignty and territorial integrity amid escalated Israeli aggression targeting the latter nation.

    • Other Conflicts

  • Philippines, China Resume Back-to-Back Foreign Ministry Consultations, Bilateral Consultation Mechanism on South China Sea Philippines DFA 28 Mar 2026 -- The Philippines and China convened back-to-back the 24th Foreign Ministry Consultations (FMC) and the 11th Meeting of the Bilateral Consultation Mechanism (BCM) on the South China Sea on 27-28 March 2026 in Quanzhou City, Fujian Province, China. The Philippine delegation was led by Foreign Affairs Undersecretary Leo M. Herrera-Lim, while the Chinese delegation was headed by Vice Foreign Minister Sun Weidong.
  • PLA Southern Theater Command urges Philippines to strictly control operations of its maritime and air troops, immediately cease provocative, risky acts Global Times 28 Mar 2026 -- Senior Captain Zhai Shichen, spokesperson for the PLA Southern Theater Command stated, on March 25, PLANS 532 was conducting a routine patrol in the waters under China's jurisdiction near Zhubi Jiao of China's Nansha Qundao. Upon detecting a Philippine Navy ship, PLANS 532 initiated radio communications to remind the Philippine ship. Ignoring repeated radio reminders from the Chinese side, the Philippine ship 507, navigating on the port side of PLANS 532, adjusted its course to the starboard side before making a deliberate turn to the same direction, dangerously approaching PLANS 532 and disrupting its navigation. PLANS 532 then took professional and standardized moves, successfully avoiding an accident.

News Reports

  • Trump signs memorandum to pay TSA workers amid prolonged partial shutdown People's Daily 28 Mar 2026 -- U.S. President Donald Trump on Friday signed a presidential memorandum to pay Transportation Security Administration (TSA) agents, who have been working without pay and facing rising absenteeism since the shutdown of the Department of Homeland Security (DHS) over a month ago.

  • WHO Member States agree to extend negotiations on key annex to the Pandemic Agreement WHO 28 Mar 2026

  • Drone attack on residence of Iraqi Kurdistan president 'clear act of terrorism': IRGC Press TV 28 Mar 2026 -- The Islamic Revolution Guards Corps (IRGC) has denounced a US-Israeli drone strike on the residence of the president of Iraq's Kurdistan Region, describing the assassination attempt as "a clear act of terrorism."
  • Condemning the Attacks on the Private Residence of Iraqi Kurdistan Region President Barzani US Dept. of State 28 Mar 2026 -- "The United States unequivocally and forcefully condemns the despicable terrorist attacks by Iran's terrorist militia proxies in Iraq on the private residence of Iraqi Kurdistan Region President Nechirvan Barzani."

  • China planning human research program at space station People's Daily 28 Mar 2026 -- The China Manned Space Agency announced that it would solicit proposals for a space human research program starting April 1, targeting major strategic, fundamental, and forward-looking scientific issues related to the long-term healthy survival of humans during future space station flights and lunar landing missions.

  • Official highlights new Chinese warfare undermining Taiwan's democracy CNA 28 Mar 2026 -- Deputy Interior Minister Ma Shih-yuan (馬士元) said Saturday that China is using what he described as "dislocation warfare" and "erosion warfare" to undermine the foundations of Taiwan's democracy and freedom.
  • Philippines reaffirms adherence to one-China policy, does not recognize Taiwan as 'sovereign state' at China-Philippines diplomatic consultation: Chinese FM Global Times 28 Mar 2026 -- China and the Philippines reaffirmed their commitment to advancing dialogue and stabilizing bilateral relations, as Manila reiterated its adherence to the one-China policy and stated that it does not recognize Taiwan as a "sovereign state," according to a statement released by the Chinese Foreign Ministry on Saturday after a new round of diplomatic consultations.
  • Ministry of National Defense Issues Press Release Regarding "PLA Joint Combat Readiness Patrol" ROC MND 28 Mar 2026 -- The Ministry of National Defense stated (March 28) that, starting at 1121 hours today, a total of 15 sorties of various People's Liberation Army (PLA) main and auxiliary aircraft, including J-10, J-16, KJ-500, and drones, were detected operating from Chinese coastal waters, with 11 sorties crossing the median line and its extension, entering Taiwan's northern, central, southwestern and eastern airspace.
  • PLA activities in the waters and airspace around Taiwan ROC MND 28 Mar 2026

  • Respected Comrade Kim Jong Un Sends Reply Message to President of PRC KCNA 28 Mar 2026 -- The respected Comrade Kim Jong Un sent a reply message to Xi Jinping, general secretary of the Central Committee of the Communist Party of China and president of the People's Republic of China, on March 27.

  • Press conference - Sydney Prime Minister of Australia 28 Mar 2026
